command:
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && mkdir -p infra/nats/config && cat > infra/nats/docker-compose.yml << 'EOF'
version: '3'

services:
  nats:
    image: nats:2.10-alpine
    container_name: moreno-nats
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '4222:4222'
      - '8222:8222'
    volumes:
      - ./config/nats.conf:/etc/nats/nats.conf:ro
      - nats_data:/data
    command: ['-c', '/etc/nats/nats.conf']

volumes:
  nats_data:
    driver: local
EOF
echo COMPOSE_WRITTEN
